changes.reason: A new high-severity control was added, so it should be triaged before lower-risk backlog work.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting
Network device configuration excerpt or management console export

control.title: Firewall management access must be restricted
control.check_summary: Review firewall management network restrictions and approved admin source ranges.
control.fix_summary: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.

changes.reason: The control was removed, so downstream tickets, evidence requests, or mappings may need cleanup.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting
Database configuration query output or parameter export

changes.reason: The severity increased to high and the remediation text changed, so old tickets or implementation notes should not be reused without review.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting
GPO, registry, or Local Security Policy export

control.title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
references: VulnDiscussion: Audit policy gaps reduce investigation quality and may require updated evidence exports.
control.check_summary: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.
control.fix_summary: Configure Windows audit policy through GPO and document the applied baseline.

changes.reason: The check procedure changed enough that evidence requests or validation steps may need to be refreshed.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting
Command output showing the configured value
Relevant policy or configuration file excerpt

control.title: Linux SSH banner must be configured
control.check_summary: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.
control.fix_summary: Configure the sshd Banner directive in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
